era_context: Early Bronze Age III. Akkadian Empire under Naram-Sin. Egyptian Old Kingdom (Dynasty 6) in final decline. Indus Valley Civilisation in mature phase.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No specific events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: The year -2516 is not individually documented in surviving sources. No specific historical events can be assigned to this year with confidence. The period remains characterised by the broad trends of Akkadian consolidation, Egyptian fragmentation, and Indus Valley urbanism, but no year-specific records exist.
